name: surreal
description: SurrealDB is the ultimate cloud database for tomorrow's applications - https://surrealdb.com/

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

options.description: Everything after this is an argument
The allowed networks for master authentication [env: ADDR=] [default: 127.0.0.1/32]
The hostname or ip address to listen for connections on [env: BIND=] [default: 0.0.0.0:8000]
Encryption key to use for on-disk encryption [env: KEY=]
Path to the CA file used when connecting to the remote KV store [env: KVS_CA=]
Path to the certificate file used when connecting to the remote KV store [env: KVS_CRT=]
Path to the private key file used when connecting to the remote KV store [env: KVS_KEY=]
The logging level for the database server [env: LOG=] [default: info] [possible values: warn, info, debug, trace, full]
The master password for the database [env: PASS=]
Whether strict mode is enabled on this database instance [env: STRICT=]
The master username for the database [env: USER=] [default: root]
Path to the certificate file for encrypted client connections [env: WEB_CRT=]
Path to the private key file for encrypted client connections [env: WEB_KEY=]

args.name: path
args.description: Database path used for storing data [env: DB_PATH=] [default: memory]

subcommands.name: backup
subcommands.description: Backup data to or from an existing database

options.description: Database authentication password to use when connecting [default: root]
Database authentication username to use when connecting [default: root]

args.name: from
args.description: Path to the remote database or file from which to export

args.name: into
args.description: Path to the remote database or file into which to import

subcommands.name: import
subcommands.description: Import a SurrealQL script into an existing database

options.description: Database authentication password to use when connecting [default: root]
Database authentication username to use when connecting [default: root]
Remote database server url to connect to [default: https://cloud.surrealdb.com]
The namespace to import the data into
The database to import the data into

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the sql file to import

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Export an existing database as a SurrealQL script

options.description: Database authentication password to use when connecting [default: root]
Database authentication username to use when connecting [default: root]
Remote database server url to connect to [default: https://cloud.surrealdb.com]
The namespace to export the data from
The database to export the data from

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the sql file to export

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Output the command-line tool version information

subcommands.name: sql
subcommands.description: Start an SQL REPL in your terminal with pipe support

options.description: Database authentication password to use when connecting [default: root]
Database authentication username to use when connecting [default: root]
Remote database server url to connect to [default: https://cloud.surrealdb.com]
The namespace to export the data from
The database to export the data from
Whether database responses should be pretty printed

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the sql file to export

options.description: Print help information
